narrative:
Munroe Falls City has 3,675 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
